news.title: CARE Ratings forms JV with Vestian Global to boost Indian market services.
news.summary: CARE Ratings forms JV with Vestian Global to boost Indian market services.

news.title:
CARE Ratings' subsidiary received license to operate as ESG rating & data provider.
License authorized by International Financial Services Centres Authority for IFSC services.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings' subsidiary received license to operate as ESG rating & data provider.
License authorized by International Financial Services Centres Authority for IFSC services.

news.title:
West Asia conflict and rising oil prices may cut India's GDP by 15-40 bps in FY27.
Economists warn prolonged tensions could accelerate inflation in India.
news.summary:
West Asia conflict and rising oil prices may cut India's GDP by 15-40 bps in FY27.
Economists warn prolonged tensions could accelerate inflation in India.

news.title:
CARE Ratings reschedules its investor/analyst meeting to 2nd March 2026 at 3 PM IST.
The meeting will discuss publicly available info; no UPSI will be shared.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings reschedules its investor/analyst meeting to 2nd March 2026 at 3 PM IST.
The meeting will discuss publicly available info; no UPSI will be shared.

news.title:
CARE Ratings Q2 FY26 net profit up 23%, revenue rises 16.2%.
Margin volatility and declining ROCE pose growth sustainability concerns.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings Q2 FY26 net profit up 23%, revenue rises 16.2%.
Margin volatility and declining ROCE pose growth sustainability concerns.

news.title:
Care Ratings' Q3 EBITDA rose to 403M INR from 304M INR YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 36.0% from 31.5% YoY.
news.summary:
Care Ratings' Q3 EBITDA rose to 403M INR from 304M INR YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 36.0% from 31.5% YoY.

news.title:
CARE Ratings Ltd's Board approved unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Net profit for Q3 FY26 stood at Rs. 3,653.96 lakhs (consolidated) and Rs. 3,605.76 lakhs (standalone), reflecting strong financial performance.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings Ltd's Board approved unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Net profit for Q3 FY26 stood at Rs. 3,653.96 lakhs (consolidated) and Rs. 3,605.76 lakhs (standalone), reflecting strong financial performance.

news.title:
CARE Ratings Ltd to hold a board meeting on Feb 11, 2026, to approve unaudited financial results for Q3 & 9 months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window closure continues till 48 hours post financial results declaration as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings Ltd to hold a board meeting on Feb 11, 2026, to approve unaudited financial results for Q3 & 9 months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window closure continues till 48 hours post financial results declaration as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Repo rate transmission to NBFCs remains slow, benefiting larger and well-rated NBFCs more due to funding diversification and market reliance.
Bank credit to NBFCs rose 10.9% YoY in October, driven by regulatory easing and improved bank appetite, though smaller NBFCs face higher borrowing costs.
news.summary:
Repo rate transmission to NBFCs remains slow, benefiting larger and well-rated NBFCs more due to funding diversification and market reliance.
Bank credit to NBFCs rose 10.9% YoY in October, driven by regulatory easing and improved bank appetite, though smaller NBFCs face higher borrowing costs.

news.title:
CARE Ratings Ltd will hold a virtual Analyst/Investor Meet on 18th Dec 2025 at 5:30 PM.
Discussions will be based on publicly available information; schedule changes possible.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings Ltd will hold a virtual Analyst/Investor Meet on 18th Dec 2025 at 5:30 PM.
Discussions will be based on publicly available information; schedule changes possible.

news.title: Care Ratings secures early success in sovereign ratings, supported by global peers.
news.summary: Care Ratings secures early success in sovereign ratings, supported by global peers.

news.title:
Care Ratings' global sovereign rating efforts gain traction, with ratings for Portugal and France aligning with global peers like S&P.
The company reported a 23% rise in H1 FY26 net profit to ₹83.7 crore; analysts bullish on margin expansion and growth opportunities.
news.summary:
Care Ratings' global sovereign rating efforts gain traction, with ratings for Portugal and France aligning with global peers like S&P.
The company reported a 23% rise in H1 FY26 net profit to ₹83.7 crore; analysts bullish on margin expansion and growth opportunities.

news.title:
CARE Ratings gains SEBI approval as Past Risk-Return Verification Agency (PaRRVA).
NSE to serve as PaRRVA Data Centre; approval valid until revoked or suspended.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings gains SEBI approval as Past Risk-Return Verification Agency (PaRRVA).
NSE to serve as PaRRVA Data Centre; approval valid until revoked or suspended.

news.title:
CARE Ratings Ltd schedules Analyst/Investor Meet on 9th Dec 2025 at 10:30 AM.
Discussions will use publicly available info; Investor Presentation is on CARE's website.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings Ltd schedules Analyst/Investor Meet on 9th Dec 2025 at 10:30 AM.
Discussions will use publicly available info; Investor Presentation is on CARE's website.

news.title:
CARE Ratings announces analyst/investor meet under SEBI Regulation 30, scheduled for Nov 24 and 27, 2025.
Meetings will involve Wasatch Global Advisors, Seven Canyon Advisors, DSP Mutual Fund; discussions based on public data.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings announces analyst/investor meet under SEBI Regulation 30, scheduled for Nov 24 and 27, 2025.
Meetings will involve Wasatch Global Advisors, Seven Canyon Advisors, DSP Mutual Fund; discussions based on public data.

news.title:
CARE Ratings to pay Rs 7/share dividend; ex-date set for Nov 5, 2024.
CARE Ratings posted 270.9% total returns over the last 5 years.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings to pay Rs 7/share dividend; ex-date set for Nov 5, 2024.
CARE Ratings posted 270.9% total returns over the last 5 years.

news.title:
CARE Ratings targets revenue growth via diversified credit rating, advisory services.
Focus on ESG, infra ratings, digital transformation; aims margin expansion by FY26.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings targets revenue growth via diversified credit rating, advisory services.
Focus on ESG, infra ratings, digital transformation; aims margin expansion by FY26.

news.title:
Care Ratings Q2 net profit rises to ₹566.6m, up from ₹460.8m YoY.
Revenue increases to ₹1.36b, EBITDA at ₹684m, margin improves to 50.2% YoY.
news.summary:
Care Ratings Q2 net profit rises to ₹566.6m, up from ₹460.8m YoY.
Revenue increases to ₹1.36b, EBITDA at ₹684m, margin improves to 50.2% YoY.

news.title:
CARE Ratings Ltd reported unaudited financial results for Q2 FY25-26 with total revenue of Rs. 13,637.1 lakh, up from Rs. 9,390.5 lakh in Q1.
Board approved Rs. 8 interim dividend per equity share and sale of 9.9% stake in CareEdge Global IFSC Ltd to SBI and NSEIX.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings Ltd reported unaudited financial results for Q2 FY25-26 with total revenue of Rs. 13,637.1 lakh, up from Rs. 9,390.5 lakh in Q1.
Board approved Rs. 8 interim dividend per equity share and sale of 9.9% stake in CareEdge Global IFSC Ltd to SBI and NSEIX.

news.title: Care Ratings approves interim dividend of ₹8/share.
news.summary: Care Ratings approves interim dividend of ₹8/share.
